tracks.rawText: 4:30Titan [2303418929]UploadNu-metal and rap-rock track at 150 BPM in the key of D minor, Distorted electric guitars play syncopated, palm-muted power chord riffs alongside a thick, overdriven bass guitar, The drum kit features a punchy, compressed snare and rapid double-kick patterns, Aggressive male vocals alternate between rhythmic rapping and shouted melodic choruses, High-pitched, dissonant synth leads and industrial sound effects provide atmospheric accents, The production is dense with heavy compression and occasional vocal doubling for emphasis, The arrangement utilizes sudden dynamic shifts between sparse, bass-heavy verses and wall-of-sound choruses3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Titan [2303418929]

tracks.rawText: 3:37Neon Dreams Callingv5.5CoverExplosive idol pop with a powerful lead vocal front and center, starting with tense filtered synths, clipped kick, and taut handclaps, then opening into a bright, full-frequency hook, Layered J-pop style harmonies, glossy supersaws, punchy 4-on-the-floor drums, octave bass, and sparkling vocal doubles with plate reverb and delay throws11PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 4:13Electric heartbeat [2289313472]UploadSynth-pop with contemporary R&B influences, Features a prominent, syncopated synth bassline and a driving electronic drum kit with a crisp snare and tight hi-hats, Lead male vocals alternate between a breathy chest voice and a clear falsetto, Layered vocal harmonies and processed vocal chops provide melodic texture, A bright, staccato synth pluck riff plays rhythmic patterns throughout the choruses, The arrangement includes atmospheric pads and occasional white noise risers for transitions, Tempo is 115 BPM in the key of G minor2PublishRemix
